text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming shopping with<n>me today.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It was very helpful getting to hear<n>your opinion
as a fellow trainer,<n>especially since...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: That's Little Cocon and Bitter Glasse<n>over there.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: What are they doing out so late?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Bitter Glasse... Are you here for the<n>same
reason?

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Looks like it! Great minds<n>think alike!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Yes, but... I haven't figured out what<n>to get yet.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Heh! I'm sure we'll find something<n>once we get
to the store!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: What are they getting? And where?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but they also appear excited<n>about
something.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
choice_data_list: You don't want to say anything?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Pardon?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes. I should have approached<n>them before
they left.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...In any case, let's follow them.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
The sun's gone down already. It's<n>not safe for
them to be out<n>unchaperoned.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
What about this cake? Looks like it'll<n>really hit
the spot!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: It's huge! There's no wayTrainer Kashimoto would be able tofinish all that!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: We can just help her out if she can't!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
That would defeat the purpose... This<n>is
supposed to be for her, not for us.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Let's give it some more thought. I<n>want to get
her something she'll really<n>like.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
For sure! I wanna thank her for<n>always putting
us first!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
We gotta make sure it comes from<n>the heart to
really make her happy!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: They're getting something... for me?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: We need to hurry back.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
If they bring the gift over immediately,<n>I won't be
there to receive it.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: We have to get back before that<n>happens! Run!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after we start sprinting, she<n>runs out of
breath, and I have to help<n>her all the way back.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... I-I need to catchmy breath... to appear calm andcomposed...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Inhale and... exhale.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
...I can't believe they wanted to<n>surprise me with
a gift.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I keep telling them not to worry about<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Really... What am I supposed to do<n>with those
two?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I ask how things<n>went that
night.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She only says that their gift was<n>delicious, but I
can easily tell how<n>grateful she feels to her
racers.
